description_long: This is a small, rustic bungalow nestled within a rocky, elevated terrain, surrounded by a wooden fence and lush greenery. The main structure features a light blue facade with a steep, gabled roof made of wooden shingles, and a smaller outbuilding with a similar design sits nearby. A single tree with bright green foliage stands close to the house, adding a natural accent to the scene. The yard is enclosed by a simple wooden fence, and the ground is covered with grass and small plants. The rocky base forms a natural boundary, giving the impression of a secluded homestead. The overall appearance is quaint and rural, with weathered textures and a cozy, lived-in feel.
description: A rustic blue bungalow with a steep gabled roof, wooden fence, and lush greenery, set on a rocky base. The scene includes a main house, a small outbuilding, and a prominent tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue bungalow, wooden fence, lush greenery, and a tree, with the main entrance and facade clearly visible.
description_view_1: Top-down angled view highlighting the shingled roof, fenced yard, and the spatial arrangement of the house and outbuilding.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bungalow, the rocky base, and less detail of the yard and fence.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the tree, side of the house, and the fence, with partial visibility of the yard and outbuilding.
